meta.phase-name: Inbound media intake and composer media ops

intent.item: Make page-local media editing feel immediate and reliable in the composer.
Let the ops team turn emailed attachments into normal Grime Time media without manual dashboard juggling.
Keep inbound processing auditable and provider-agnostic.

tasks.task: Define the inbound media ingestion contract, validation rules, logging, and replay behavior.
Finish composer replace and drop assignment polish so the correct media slot surface opens or refreshes immediately.
Implement Resend inbound attachment ingestion into first-party media records and expose result state for ops review.
